Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
title: Interfering resonances in the 19F(alpha,p)22Ne reaction

x4freetext: The 3 MV Van de Graaff generator was used
Eight surface barrier detectors situated at
172 degrees with respect to the incoming beam were
Targets of SrF2 evaporated on a solid backing were
used. Targets with the thicknesses of 10 ug/cm2 were
used for the energy less than 2300 keV and of
20 ug/cm2 for the energy more than 2300 keV.
The target deterioration is the main reason
of the uncertainty in yields and strengths.
